attributes.description: Petronet LNG Ltd was formed to develop, design, construct, own and operate Liquefied Natural Gas (LNG) Import and regasification terminals in India.[1] It was incorporated in 1998 as a Joint Venture among GAIL, Indian Oil, Bharat Petroleum & ONGC holding 12.5% each.[2]

Petronet LNG Ltd was formed to develop, design, construct, own and operate Liquefied Natural Gas (LNG) Import and regasification terminals in India.[1] It was incorporated in 1998 as a Joint Venture among GAIL, Indian Oil, Bharat Petroleum & ONGC holding 12.5% each.[2]
